title: breakpoints_per_method
description: Long-format companion to boundary_refined_{left,right}. One row per (method, side) with the method's own estimate, weight applied in the consensus, optional per-method CI (where the method natively produces one), signed distance to the consensus, and a boolean flag for 'within the agreement band' (|distance_to_consensus| <= 2 * weighted_MAD). Used for audit and for the diagnostic figure (script 04), which plots per-method estimates as horizontal tick marks colored by within_agreement_band. Methods: ancestral_fragments (weight 3.0), block_extension (2.0), c01j_transitions (2.0), step40_coherence (1.0), step41_switches (1.0), c01l_segments (1.0), step37_sv (0.5).
question: Q3

methods.description: One entry per (method, side) that contributed an estimate.

source_path.description: Path to the upstream file this estimate was read from, for provenance.
